000.reason: Pupils rise with upward head pitch and visible chin.

090.reason: Pupils, nose, muzzle, and cheek turn toward screen-right.

180.reason: Pupils lower as the head pitches toward the laptop.

270.reason: Pupils, nose, muzzle, and cheek turn screen-left opposite 090.

review_warnings: Horizontal pupil travel is subtle at 192x208, but accompanying head and muzzle yaw preserves direction readability.
Three isolated blind reviewers classified every horizontal and vertical pair as ambiguous, including both cardinal hard gates.
